iN LiFE iS HERE

Dens Haven is located at Kolenchery near Kochi

Check out More Location

Modern & Safe Living

This lifestyle space has been uniquely designed to capture both the modern and classic architecture. It is the combination of comfort, convenience and connectivity that makes this one of the most desired residential projec

amenities

Luxury Interiors

We spend a good part of our lives trying to build the home of our dreams. An deal home can never be defined, it’s variable. But at the end of the day, what makes it stand out are the conveniences offered.

interiors

Peaceful Location

Centrally located between the city of Kochi and Muvattupuzha, lies this idyllic place Kolenchery. Backed by rich history and cultural heritage, this place could never go out of style. Known for its dense foliage and agrarian efforts.

location

DENS Haven

GARDEN VILLAS

Dens Garden villas is a project of Dens Developers. Located in Kolenchery, it is a luxury villa project featuring 22 villas in 3000 sq.ft – 4500 sq.ft. We assure to build a home you could always be proud of – in terms of quality, architecture and the space. Surrounded by plush greenery, the call of the birds, clean fresh air, and just so much of open space – this is home.

THE PROMOTER

Dens Haven villa project is promoted by Pradeep Kuriakose, Chennakkattu, Kolenchery. Pradeep is a civil engineer by profession with about twenty five years of real time experience in civil construction. He is also the Managing Partner of the group, K C Den & Co., an ‘A’ class contracting firm. The projects undertaken and executed by the firm include various works in Idukki Hydro Electric Project, Kerala PWD and Irrigation Department Projects. The recently completed projects include Petronet Project, Thrippunithura Government Arts College, Piravom Government Hospital, Maradu Municipality office complex and various houses and flats in and around Ernakulam.

THE ARCHiTECT

SILPI’ is a multidisciplinary firm involved in Architecture, Planning, Landscape & Interior designing lead by Ar. Sebastian Jose, a post graduate from the School of Planning and Architecture, New Delhi. Silpi has a team of highly qualified professionals including Architects, Engineers, Planners and Interior Designers. The firm has won several awards including IIA State Awards, Vanitha Veedu Architecture Awards, Asianet Dream Home Awards, Mathrubhumi Mastercraft etc. on several occasions. Silpi is known for the functional, creative, contextual and environmentally sensitive design solutions and was selected as one of the India’s Top 50 upcoming practices by Architects & Interiors India in 2013.

Let’s check the benefits of this project from the architect

AMENITIES

Clubhouse   |   Shuttle Court   |   Party Hall   |   Swimming Pool   |   Multi Gym   |   Landscaped Garden   |   Closed Circuit TV Monitoring System for Main Streets   |   Intercom Broadband Connectivity Landscaping for Villa-front Yard   |   Street light   |   Amphi theatre   |   Table Tennis   |   Association Room   |   Guest-Room   |   Common Servant’s Toilet   |   Children’s Play Area   |   Basketball Half Court   |   7m Wide Roads with Jogging Track   |   All Round Compound Walls with Security Cabin   |   Vasthu Friendly

A MATTER OF THE INSiDES

Interior Parts

When you have a home so beautiful on the outsides, it is important to have an equally wondrous inside. Designed to incorporate privacy and comfort, the villas are two storied with

  • Four bedrooms
  • Double height dining
  • Family living on both levels
  • Coffee area
  • Covered utility
  • Home theatre at the upper level
  • Opening out into the terrace
  • Separate room for domestic help
  • Terrace garden on top.
